ns0:entry.ns0:title: CliMA/ClimaOcean.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaOcean.jl
Language: julia
🌎 Regional-to-global coupled ocean and sea ice simulations based on Oceananigans

ns0:entry.ns0:title: EnzymeAD/Enzyme.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EnzymeAD/Enzyme.jl
Language: julia
Julia bindings for the Enzyme automatic differentiator

ns0:entry.ns0:title: EnzymeAD/Reactant.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EnzymeAD/Reactant.jl
Language: julia
Optimize Julia Functions With MLIR and XLA for High-Performance Execution on CPU, GPU, TPU and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GenericMappingTools/GMT.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GenericMappingTools/GMT.jl
Language: julia
Generic Mapping Tools Library Wrapper for Julia

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ITensor/ITensors.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ITensor/ITensors.jl
Language: julia
A Julia library for efficient tensor computations and tensor network calculations. ITensors.jl is supported by the Simons Foundation's Flatiron Institute.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliaDiff/DifferentiationInterface.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliaDiff/DifferentiationInterface.jl
Language: julia
An interface to various automatic differentiation backends in Julia.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliaGeometry/Meshes.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliaGeometry/Meshes.jl
Language: julia
Computational geometry in Julia

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliaLang/julia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia
Language: julia
The Julia Programming Language

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliaRegistries/General
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliaRegistries/General
Language: julia
The official registry of general Julia packages

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliaSymbolics/Symbolics.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliaSymbolics/Symbolics.jl
Language: julia
Symbolic programming for the next generation of numerical software

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LuxDL/Lux.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LuxDL/Lux.jl
Language: julia
Elegant and Performant Deep Learning

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MakieOrg/Makie.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MakieOrg/Makie.jl
Language: julia
Interactive data visualizations and plotting in Julia

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Nemocas/AbstractAlgebra.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Nemocas/AbstractAlgebra.jl
Language: julia
Generic abstract algebra functionality in pure Julia (no C dependencies)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SciML/Catalyst.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SciML/Catalyst.jl
Language: julia
Chemical reaction network and systems biology interface for scientific machine learning (SciML). High performance, GPU-parallelized, and O(1) solvers in open source software.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SciML/ModelingToolkit.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SciML/ModelingToolkit.jl
Language: julia
An acausal modeling framework for automatically parallelized scientific machine learning (SciML) in Julia. A computer algebra system for integrated symbolics for physics-informed machine learning and automated transformations of differential equations

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SciML/NonlinearSolve.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SciML/NonlinearSolve.jl
Language: julia
High-performance and differentiation-enabled nonlinear solvers (Newton methods), bracketed rootfinding (bisection, Falsi), with sparsity and Newton-Krylov support.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SciML/SciMLSensitivity.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SciML/SciMLSensitivity.jl
Language: julia
A component of the DiffEq ecosystem for enabling sensitivity analysis for scientific machine learning (SciML). Optimize-then-discretize, discretize-then-optimize, adjoint methods, and more for ODEs, SDEs, DDEs, DAEs, etc.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SpeedyWeather/SpeedyWeather.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SpeedyWeather/SpeedyWeather.jl
Language: julia
Play atmospheric modelling like it's LEGO.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TulipaEnergy/TulipaEnergyModel.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TulipaEnergy/TulipaEnergyModel.jl
Language: julia
An energy system optimization model that is flexible, computationally efficient, and academically robust.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: finch-tensor/Finch.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/finch-tensor/Finch.jl
Language: julia
Sparse and Structured Tensor Compiler

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jump-dev/JuMP.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jump-dev/JuMP.jl
Language: julia
Modeling language for Mathematical Optimization (linear, mixed-integer, conic, semidefinite, nonlinear)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jump-dev/MathOptInterface.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jump-dev/MathOptInterface.jl
Language: julia
A data structure for mathematical optimization problems

ns0:entry.ns0:title: oscar-system/Oscar.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/oscar-system/Oscar.jl
Language: julia
A comprehensive open source computer algebra system for computations in algebra, geometry, and number theory.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: qutip/QuantumToolbox.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/qutip/QuantumToolbox.jl
Language: julia

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/trixi-framework/Trixi.jl
Language: julia
Trixi.jl: Adaptive high-order numerical simulations of conservation laws in Julia
